---
name: Module change request
about: Add or change a component, input, or output
title: "[change] <component>: <short summary>"
labels: enhancement
---

**Component(s)**
<!-- Which component(s) — or "new component: <name>". -->

**What's needed**
<!-- The new input / output / behavior. Sketch the interface (variable or output) if you can. -->

**Why**
<!-- The environment or use-case driving it — keep the module generic, push env-specifics to the env repo. -->

**Breaking?**
<!-- Does this change an existing input/output so callers must edit their config? (MAJOR if yes) -->
